rationale: Pattern B implemented per create-semantics.md: strict create_entity_strict path wired into typed GraphQL createXxx, HTTP/gRPC retain upsert, storage put documented as overwrite. All 5 surface tests added; both linked beads closed with cross-references.

findings.summary: Reviewed diff (d72132f) only contains .ddx execution evidence; the actual implementation is the bead's closing_commit_sha e08baf3 (referenced by manifest/result). Evaluation considered that commit's changes since the bead-review block describes the same work.

Strict path implemented as a new wrapper (create_entity_strict_with_caller) that performs a pre-check via storage.get before delegating to the existing create path. Race-window between get and put is acceptable for the in-memory adapter but worth noting for future SQL-backed adapters; not in scope for this AC set.
